ValidationRule.description: Case Status cannot be set to Approved until the case goes through Approval Process
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.Name = 'Customer Care - Complaint' , Is_Approved__c = FALSE ,ISPICKVAL( Status ,('Approved') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_CASE_018: Case Status cannot be set to Approved until the case goes through Approval Process
